div.head: The Minister in Colombia (Caffery) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
Sir: Referring to the Department’s telegram No. 33 of February 21, 11 a.m. in regard to the possible repatriation of Colombians in
Peru,Not printed; see telegram No. 38 to the Ambassador in Peru, supra. I have the honor to transmit herewith copies of a telegram sent by the Legation to the American Embassy at Lima at the request of the Colombian Foreign Office.Not printed.

The Foreign Office in a note to the Legation expresses “fears that its communications with the Embassy of the United States at Lima may be delayed or interrupted” and remarks that “it has no code with which to communicate with said Embassy.” It wishes this Legation to act as transmitting agent for cables between it and the American Embassy at Lima sent in code. The Foreign Office asks that all such telegrams be charged to the account of the Colombian Government.
